title: Escape from Enies Lobby
main_description: The Straw Hats survive the Buster Call and say farewell to the Going Merry. The chapter mainly follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp, Sanji, Chopper, keeping the focus on the Enies Lobby Climax storyline.
key_events: Escape from Enies Lobby: Rising Conflict
Escape from Enies Lobby: Key Exchange
Escape from Enies Lobby: Turning Point
